ucs.title: [LLM] FIN6 'more_eggs' loader: squiblytwo (wmic XSL) and squiblydoo (regsvr32 scrobj) execution from fake-resume lures
ucs.description: Catches FIN6 / Skeleton Spider's signature initial-execution chain where a LinkedIn/recruitment-themed ZIP+LNK lure invokes wmic.exe with a remote .xsl payload (T1220) or regsvr32 /i: scrobj.dll (T1218.010) to stage the more_eggs/TerraLoader JScript backdoor. Mandiant and Gigamon attribute this exact LOLBin chain to FIN6 (ITG08, Camouflage Tempest) across the 2019-2024 campaigns that pivoted from FrameworkPOS skimming to Ryuk/LockerGoga/Trinity ransomware staging.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name=wmic.exe AND Processes.process="*format:*" AND (Processes.process="*http*" OR Processes.process="*.xsl*")) OR (Processes.process_name=regsvr32.exe AND Processes.process="*scrobj.dll*" AND Processes.process="*/i:*http*") OR (Processes.process_name IN (cscript.exe,wscript.exe) AND (Processes.process="*.js *" OR Processes.process="*.jse *") AND Processes.parent_process_name IN (explorer.exe,outlook.exe,winrar.exe,7zfm.exe,chrome.exe,msedge.exe,firefox.exe)) by host Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.user Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(user, "\$$") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let _lookback = 30d;
let _browsers_archivers = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","explorer.exe","outlook.exe","winrar.exe","7zfm.exe","7zg.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(_lookback)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where
    // squiblytwo - FIN6 signature for more_eggs / TerraLoader
    (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "format:"
        and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)format:[""' ]?https?://|\.xsl")
    or
    // squiblydoo - regsvr32 staging the JScript backdoor
    (FileName =~ "regsvr32.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "scrobj.dll"
        and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)/i:[""' ]?https?://")
    or
    // direct JScript execution from the resume.zip lure
    (FileName in~ ("cscript.exe","wscript.exe")
        and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.(js|jse|wsf)\b"
        and InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_browsers_archivers))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _lookback = 30d;
let _browsers_archivers = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","explorer.exe","outlook.exe","winrar.exe","7zfm.exe","7zg.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(_lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ChildBin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, '\\')[-1])),
         ParentBin = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, '\\')[-1]))
| where
    (ChildBin == "wmic.exe"
        and CommandLine has "format:"
        and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)format:[""' ]?https?://|\.xsl")
    or
    (ChildBin == "regsvr32.exe"
        and CommandLine has "scrobj.dll"
        and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)/i:[""' ]?https?://")
    or
    (ChildBin in ("cscript.exe","wscript.exe")
        and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.(js|jse|wsf)\b"
        and ParentBin in (_browsers_archivers))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          Parent = ParentProcessName,
          Child  = NewProcessName,
          CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: FIN6 more_eggs Loader via squiblytwo / squiblydoo LOLBin Chain
id: 7b2c0a44-fin6-moreeggs-squibly
status: experimental
description: Detects FIN6 / Skeleton Spider initial-execution tradecraft using wmic.exe XSL Script Processing or regsvr32 /i: scrobj.dll to stage the more_eggs (TerraLoader) JScript backdoor delivered via fake-resume LinkedIn lures.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0037/
  - https://www.gigamon.com/resources/blog/fin6-skeleton-spider/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/fin6-cybercrime-now-deploys-ransomware
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/04
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1220
  - attack.t1218.010
  - attack.t1059.007
  - attack.g0037
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  squiblytwo:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: 'format:'
    CommandLine|re: '(?i)format:[\"'' ]?https?://|\.xsl'
  squiblydoo:
    Image|endswith: '\regsvr32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'scrobj.dll'
    CommandLine|re: '(?i)/i:[\"'' ]?https?://'
  jscript_from_lure:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
    CommandLine|re: '(?i)\.(js|jse|wsf)\b'
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\explorer.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\winrar.exe'
      - '\7zfm.exe'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (squiblytwo or squiblydoo or jscript_from_lure) and not filter_machine
fields:
  - Image
  - ParentImage
  - CommandLine
  - User
  - ComputerName
falsepositives:
  - Legacy management scripts that legitimately consume remote XSL stylesheets (rare; should be allowlisted by signed publisher / known URL).
level: high
ucs.rationale: wmic.exe /format: with a remote URL (squiblytwo) and regsvr32 /i:http*scrobj.dll (squiblydoo) are the documented FIN6 indicators for staging more_eggs / TerraLoader from fake-resume lures - this exact LOLBin pair is called out in Mandiant, Gigamon and Trend Micro reporting on ITG08 / Skeleton Spider and is rarely produced by legitimate enterprise software, giving very high signal-to-noise. Pairing

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

_sigma_issues:
yaml/sigma error: mapping values are not allowed in this context
  in "<unicode string>", line 4, column 125

ucs.title: [LLM] FIN6 NTDS.dit theft via ntdsutil IFM and follow-on credential exfil prep on domain controllers
ucs.description: Hunts FIN6's post-compromise domain dominance step where Cobalt Strike operators run ntdsutil.exe with 'IFM / create full' on a DC to dump NTDS.dit + SYSTEM hive into a staging directory (T1003.003), often immediately followed by 7z/rar archive creation and SMB pull-back to a jump host. Mandiant FIN6 reporting, CrowdStrike (Skeleton Spider) and the FireEye 2019 'pivot to ransomware' write-ups all cite ntdsutil IFM as the FIN6 NTDS-dump method of choice (vs. shadow-copy or DCSync) because it bypasses VSS-deletion detections.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name=ntdsutil.exe AND (Processes.process="*ifm*" OR Processes.process="*create full*" OR Processes.process="*ac i ntds*" OR Processes.process="*activate instance ntds*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=outer host [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Filesystem.file_name) as files values(Filesystem.file_path) as paths from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name=ntds.dit OR Filesystem.file_name=SYSTEM OR Filesystem.file_name=SECURITY OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit" OR Filesystem.file_name IN ("*.7z","*.rar","*.zip")) by host _time | rename _time as fs_time] | where NOT match(user, "\$$") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let _lookback = 14d;
let _ntds_proc = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(_lookback)
    | where FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ifm","create full","ac i ntds","activate instance ntds")
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | project NtdsTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName,
              InitiatingProcessCommandLine, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession;
_ntds_proc
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(_lookback)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FileName in~ ("ntds.dit","SYSTEM","SECURITY")
         or FileName endswith ".7z"
         or FileName endswith ".rar"
         or FileName endswith ".zip"
    | project FileTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              DroppedFile = FileName, DroppedPath = FolderPath,
              FileWriter = InitiatingProcessFileName
  ) on DeviceId
| where isnull(FileTime) or FileTime between (NtdsTime .. NtdsTime + 30m)
| project NtdsTime, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession,
          FileTime, DroppedFile, DroppedPath, FileWriter
| order by NtdsTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _lookback = 14d;
let _ntds_proc = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(_lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend ChildBin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, '\\')[-1]))
    | where ChildBin == "ntdsutil.exe"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("ifm","create full","ac i ntds","activate instance ntds")
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project NtdsTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              CommandLine, ParentProcessName, NewProcessId, SubjectLogonId;
_ntds_proc
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(_lookback)
    | where EventID == 4663   // object access - file write
    | extend ObjLower = tolower(ObjectName)
    | where ObjLower has "ntds.dit"
         or ObjLower has "\\system"
         or ObjLower has "\\security"
         or ObjLower endswith ".7z"
         or ObjLower endswith ".rar"
         or ObjLower endswith ".zip"
    | project FileTime = TimeGenerated, Computer,
              DroppedPath = ObjectName, AccessingProc = ProcessName
  ) on Computer
| where isnull(FileTime) or FileTime between (NtdsTime .. NtdsTime + 30m)
| project NtdsTime, Computer, Account, CommandLine, ParentProcessName,
          FileTime, DroppedPath, AccessingProc
| order by NtdsTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: FIN6 NTDS.dit Theft via ntdsutil IFM
id: 1d8a4f12-fin6-ntdsutil-ifm
status: experimental
description: Detects FIN6 / Skeleton Spider use of ntdsutil.exe with the IFM (Install From Media) command set to dump NTDS.dit and registry hives from a domain controller for offline credential extraction.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1003/003/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0037/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/fin6-cybercrime-now-deploys-ransomware
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/04
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.003
  - attack.g0037
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\ntdsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ifm'
      - 'create full'
      - 'ac i ntds'
      - 'activate instance ntds'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection and not filter_machine
fields:
  - Image
  - ParentImage
  - CommandLine
  - User
  - ComputerName
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned AD backup / DR rehearsal performed by a named change-controlled service account from an admin jump host (allowlist by user + source).
level: critical
ucs.rationale: ntdsutil 'IFM / create full' is a Tier-0 administrative action that legitimately runs only during sanctioned AD backups - any unscheduled execution under an interactive user, especially correlated within 30 minutes with archive/.dit file creation on the same DC, mirrors FIN6's documented domain-dominance playbook (the same group also pivots to Ryuk/LockerGoga/Trinity ransomware after this step). F

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceFileEvents, DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
